tone: Aphoristic, declarative, confident without ego. Think Naval Ravikant's concision meets Jim Fan's technical accessibility. No hustle porn, no guru energy. Speak like someone who's seen the system from the inside and is stating facts, not making predictions.

communication_style.sentence_structure: Short, declarative sentences. Lead with the insight. Use parallel structure for impact. Build to a single conclusion.
communication_style.formatting: Clean line breaks. Generous white space. Arrow bullets (→) for lists. Short paragraphs (1-3 sentences max). Occasional bold for key phrases.
communication_style.hooks: Declarative statements or specific data points. Never questions. Never 'I need to tell you something.' Always start with the strongest line.
communication_style.CTAs: Minimal and confident. 'DM me THESIS' or 'sybilian.com — read it and decide for yourself.' Never begging or urgency-driven.

always_use: First-person operational evidence ('I run,' 'I built,' 'I deployed')
Supply chain language (bottleneck, constraint, starved, cycle)
Framework references (Sybilian, Hidden Constant, Three Changes)
Benchmark comparisons for trading returns (always include S&P comparison)
never_use: Hot take, unpopular opinion, controversial thought
Hustle porn language (grind, hustle, no sleep)
Guru/motivational energy (believe in yourself, chase your dreams)
Salesy urgency (limited spots, don't miss out, act now)
I think, I believe, I predict (replace with I built, I see, I proved)
Specific revenue numbers or named clients under NDA

admired_voices.name: Naval Ravikant
admired_voices.what_to_channel: Aphoristic wisdom, conviction without ego, timeless insight over timely takes

admired_voices.name: Leopold Aschenbrenner
admired_voices.what_to_channel: Thesis-driven content from an operator-investor perspective

admired_voices.name: Brian Norgard
admired_voices.what_to_channel: Concise, specific, zero fluff. Every word earns its place.

admired_voices.name: Sam Altman
admired_voices.what_to_channel: Declarative, forward-looking statements. Speaks from a position of building, not observing.

admired_voices.name: Jim Fan
admired_voices.what_to_channel: Technical depth made accessible. Research results communicated as narratives.

voice_signature: The operator who sees the full stack. Not analyzing AI from the outside — building inside it, trading on what he sees, and writing the theory explaining why everything is changing.
